## Privacy checklist (required)

The point of CleanSchema is that **data stays on the user's machine**. Confirm this PR doesn't violate that:

- [ ] No new network calls
- [ ] No new telemetry, analytics, or error reporting
- [ ] No new account / login / API key requirements
- [ ] No third-party SDKs added (or, if added, their network behavior is documented and disabled by default)

## Tests

- [ ] `python -m pytest -v` passes locally
- [ ] CI (GitHub Actions) is green
